description: Patient social history relevant to cancer care, including smoking, alcohol, and substance use.

items.name: Categorical Smoking History
items.description: Categorical smoking status (e.g., never, former, current)

items.name: Pack Years
items.description: Smoking exposure in pack-years, extract whatever was documented

items.name: Alcohol Use
items.description: Alcohol use status (e.g., never, former, current, social)

items.name: Substance Use
items.description: Other substance use history as documented
